description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Special Train Service Arrangements for Lunar New Year
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 新春列車服務特別安排

2025-01-29T06:35:00.CONTENT_EN: Enhanced train services for Lunar New Year To make passenger's travel more convenient during the festive season, MTR have increased the train frequency on all lines (except Airport Express) at various times until 4 February. 30 January • Train frequencies will be enhanced at various times on the Kwun Tong Line, Tsuen Wan Line, Island Line, South Island Line, Tuen Ma Line, East Rail Line and Tung Chung Line 31 January – 2 February • The last Airport Express will depart from AsiaWorld-Expo Station at 1:00 am the next day Please refer to MTR's website for more information.
2025-01-29T06:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 新春列車服務特別安排 為方便乘客新春期間出行，本地鐵路綫（機場快綫除外）於不同時段加密列車班次，直至2月4日。 年初二（1月30日）​ 觀塘綫、荃灣綫、港島綫、南港島綫、屯馬綫、東鐵綫及東涌綫於不同時段加密班次 年初三至五（1月31至2月2日）​ 機場快綫博覽館站尾班車延至翌日01:00開出 詳情請參閱港鐵網頁。

2025-01-31T08:07:00.CONTENT_EN:
Enhanced train services for Lunar New Year

To make passenger's travel more convenient during the festive season, MTR have increased the train frequency on all lines (except Airport Express) at various times until 4 February. 

31 January – 2 February

• The last Airport Express will depart from AsiaWorld-Expo Station at 1:00 am the next day

Please refer to MTR's website for more information.
2025-01-31T08:07:00.CONTENT_CN:
新春列車服務特別安排

為方便乘客新春期間出行，本地鐵路綫（機場快綫除外）於不同時段加密列車班次，直至2月4日。

年初三至五（1月31至2月2日）​

• 機場快綫博覽館站尾班車延至翌日01:00開出

詳情請參閱港鐵網頁。

Motorists passing through the above road sections are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.

以下路段的交通繁忙:
–山頂道
–馬己仙峽道

前往山頂的市民請考慮使用公共交通服務。
駕駛人士行經上述路段敬請忍讓及小心駕駛。

2025-01-30T19:30:00.CONTENT_EN:
Traffic at the following road sections have resumed normal:
– Peak Road
– Magazine Gap Road.
2025-01-30T19:30:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下路段的交通現已恢復正常:
–山頂道
–馬己仙峽道。

2025-01-30T22:36:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , the tunnel tube slow lane of Cross Harbour Tunnel (Hong Kong Island bound) is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

2025-01-31T15:43:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle on fire , all lanes of Lion Rock Tunnel Road (Kowloon (Kowloon bound) near Lion Rock Tunnel (Kowloon Exit) are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
2025-01-31T15:43:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛着火，獅子山隧道公路(往九龍方向)近獅子山隧道(九龍出口)的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2025-01-31T15:47:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle on fire , tunnel tube all lanes of Lion Rock Tunnel (Kowloon bound) are closed to all traffic.   Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   Traffic is busy now.
2025-01-31T15:47:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛着火，獅子山隧道(往九龍方向)的管道全線現已封閉。  駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2025-01-31T16:01:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle on fire , the tunnel tube fast lane of Lion Rock Tunnel (Kowloon bound) is still being closed to all traffic.   The tunnel tube slow lane of Lion Rock Tunnel (Kowloon bound) has been reopened to all traffic. Motorists cannot enter Waterloo Road (Tsim Sha Tsui bound) via Lion Rock Tunnel (Kowloon bound). Motorists can only divert to Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound).   Traffic is busy now.
2025-01-31T16:01:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛着火，獅子山隧道(往九龍方向)的管道快線仍然封閉。  獅子山隧道(往九龍方向)的管道慢線現已解封。沿獅子山隧道(往九龍方向)行駛的車輛不能前往窩打老道(往尖沙咀方向)。車輛只能改經龍翔道(往觀塘方向)。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2025-01-31T16:21:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle on fire , the tunnel tube fast lane of Lion Rock Tunnel (Kowloon bound) is still being closed to all traffic.   The tunnel tube slow lane of Lion Rock Tunnel (Kowloon bound) was reopened to all traffic. Vehicles cannot access to Waterloo Road (Tsim Sha Tsui bound) via Lion Rock Tunnel (Kowloon bound). Vehicles were diverted to Lung Cheung Road (Kwun Tong bound).   Traffic queue on Lion Rock Tunnel (Kowloon bound) ends at Lion Rock Tunnel Road near Hung Mui Kuk Road.   Traffic is congested now.
2025-01-31T16:21:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛着火，獅子山隧道(往九龍方向)的管道快線仍然封閉。  獅子山隧道(往九龍方向)的管道慢線現已解封。沿獅子山隧道(往九龍方向)行駛的車輛不能前往窩打老道(往尖沙咀方向)。車輛須改道往龍翔道(往觀塘方向)。  現時在獅子山隧道(往九龍方向)的車龍龍尾已到獅子山隧道公路近紅梅谷路。  現時上址交通擠塞。

2025-01-31T16:55:00.CONTENT_EN: The tunnel tube fast lane of Lion Rock Tunnel (Kowloon bound) which was closed due to vehicle on fire is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.
2025-01-31T16:55:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛着火而封閉的獅子山隧道(往九龍方向)的管道快線現已解封。 車龍有待消散。
